title: Coherence as a Quantum Resource
description: Master the resource theory of quantum coherence - understanding superposition as a resource, incoherent operations, coherence measures, and the deep connections between coherence and other quantum resources.
learningObjectives: Define quantum coherence in the resource-theoretic framework with respect to a fixed basis
Classify incoherent operations: IO, SIO, MIO, and DIO
Calculate key coherence measures: l1-norm, relative entropy, and robustness
Understand the relationship between coherence and entanglement
Analyze coherence manipulation protocols and their fundamental limits
Apply coherence theory to quantum thermodynamics and metrology
